systemicFixes.skinTone: Reference-anchored generation resolved the skin lightening problem. The anchor image (reggina-anchor-v1.png) establishes the correct darkness baseline that propagates to all generated scenes.
systemicFixes.headband: Including the anchor as reference image improved headband accuracy. The model picks up the two-prong angular shape from the reference.
systemicFixes.artStyle: Explicitly including 'UE5 photorealistic' + 'NOT anime, NOT cartoon, NOT 2D' in every prompt eliminated the art style drift.
